description: The image shows a network topology diagram featuring two Cisco routers (cisco1 and cisco2) connected in series via their E0/1 interfaces, with IP addresses 10.20.30.1 and 10.20.30.2 respectively. On either side of the routers are Ubuntu servers (ubuntu1 and ubuntu2), each connected to a router's E0/2 interface. The Ubuntu servers have IP addresses 10.20.30.10 and 10.20.30.10, with their respective interfaces labeled as ens2 (eth1) for ubuntu1 and eth0-OOB for ubuntu2. The diagram also includes annotations such as "This server is owned by Adam Kmet" next to ubuntu2. All devices are connected within the same subnet 10.20.30.0/24, and there are no visible errors or anomalies in the topology.
